title: Utility methods for converting Counters to JSON and to TimelineMetric.
description: This directory contains utility methods for converting Counters to JSON and to TimelineMetric. The countersToJSON method converts the given Counters object to a JSON representation using the Jackson library. The countersToTimelineMetric method converts the given Counters object to a set of TimelineMetric objects, with an optional group name prefix. These utility methods are used for various purposes such as logging and monitoring.
